title: Weekly Coach Boost
subtitle: Pick one boost per week for your team. Resets every Monday at 00:00 (BRT).
no_active: No boost picked for this week.
pick_one_warning: You can pick only ONE boost per week. Once confirmed, it's locked until the next reset.

formation.label: Formation
formation.description: +5% to all attributes when the team uses the trained formation.

fitness.label: Fitness
fitness.description: Reduces every player's energy drain per turn by 10%.

set_piece.label: Set Pieces
set_piece.description: Improves precision on dead-ball restarts (free kicks, corners, penalties, throw-ins, goal kicks) by 15%.

mentality.label: Mentality
mentality.description: +10% to all mental attributes while the team is losing.

training_focus.label: Training Focus
training_focus.description: Pick an attribute category. Every player gets +10% gain on training that category this week.
training_focus.bonus: +10% gain on training the chosen category
